Action Exercise Guide
Let me be clear… building YOUR list is the single most important
thing you can do to create a highly successful business online.
To get you moving in the right direction, we’ve created a number of
simple exercises to help you put the key list building strategies and
tactics we cover in this course into practice. Take your time and work
through each task one by one…. you’ll be glad you did!
I recommend printing out this assignment guide and keeping it close
at hand as you work your way through the training videos.
PHASE ONE: Developing Your List Building Strategy
Action Task #1
Identify Your Avatar (Lesson 2)
Brainstorm the type of “Avatar” that personifies the type of person you
would like to have on your email list.

-- 1 of 6 --

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Action Task #2
Getting Connected with Your List (Lesson 3)
Document what you are currently doing to add new names to your
list. Assess your current strategies for keeping your list fresh.
Action Task #3
Finding Your Niche (Lesson 4)
Complete the “Niche Self Assessment” document to better define the
market you are targeting with your products and services.
Action Task #4
Defining the Avatar of Your Email List (Lesson 5)
Complete the “Define Your Avatar” document. Then, go to Google,
research some niche forums/social networks, and start documenting
the hot topics for your market.

-- 2 of 6 --

3
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Action Task #5
Selecting Your Email List Host (Lesson 6)
We recommend signing up for a 30-Day $1 trial with ProFollow.com.
Also, this is a good time to review the quick start tutorial on setting up
an email list with Profollow.
PHASE TWO: Creating Your List Building System
Action Task #6
Review your Current Assets (Lesson 7)
Review your current assets (email / non-email lists) and make note of
those areas you would like to develop further.
Action Task #7
Choosing Your Irresistible Bribe (Lesson 8)
Review the “Bribe Ideas” document and brainstorm the type of bribe
you think might work well with your audience.

-- 3 of 6 --

4
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Action Task #8
Setting Up Squeeze Page (Lesson 9)
Using the “Squeeze Page Planner”, map out the core squeeze page
elements you want to include to maximize your lead conversions.
Action Task #9
Testing Your Squeeze Pages (Lesson 10)
Watch the Google Website Optimizer tutorial and begin to map out
the specific elements you might want to split test for your squeeze
pages (i.e. headlines, copy, video, design format, etc).
Action Task #10
Mastering Email Marketing Lingo (Lesson 11)
Review email terminology guide to get familiarized with the important
terms and principles in the email marketing space.

-- 4 of 6 --

5
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Action Task #11
Building a Relationship with Your List (Lesson 12)
Review tutorials on how to set up your auto-responder sequence and
broadcast emails in Profollow.
PHASE THREE: Building a Profitable Email List
Action Task #12
Writing Your Autoresponder Sequence (Lesson 14)
Start to map out the first 5-6 autoresponders in your email sequence.
Action Task #13
Creating Your Personal Narrative (Lesson 15)
Map out your own personal narrative and story and determine how
you can make a unique connection with your target audience.

-- 5 of 6 --

6
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Action Task #14
Split-testing Emails (Lesson 16)
Take 10 minutes and write 10 possible subject lines you might
consider using for future emails. Remember the DBB (Don’t Be
Boring) principle. Also, refer to the “Sample Headlines” document for
more inspiration and ideas!

-- 6 of 6 --
